overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a red futuristic sports car driving on an elevated highway through Night City at night. The scene features towering skyscrapers with massive holographic advertisements, including a blue jellyfish and a red koi fish swimming through the air, illuminated by neon lights and searchlights.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway through cyberpunk city center with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: piloting the red sports car straight along the elevated highway toward the city center

entered.detail: futuristic red and white sports car with glowing blue thrusters
giant translucent blue jellyfish hologram floating between skyscrapers
tall futuristic glass and steel buildings with illuminated windows
large vertical digital billboards displaying advertisements on building facades
reflective dark asphalt road with glowing lane markers

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a red sports car driving straight along an elevated highway through Night City. A massive blue holographic jellyfish floats in the distance between towering glass skyscrapers covered in neon billboards. The highway stretches forward through the urban canyon, illuminated by searchlights and neon reflections on the wet road surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved elevated highway with large-scale holographic displays

events.description: vehicle initiates a left turn on the elevated highway
massive red holographic koi fish materializes and swims through the air on the left side

agents.ego_description: navigating a left curve on the elevated highway while the holographic koi fish swims alongside

entered.detail: giant glowing orange-red koi fish hologram with flowing fins swimming through the air
tall building with orange-tinted glass facade and illuminated structural elements

segments.scene_description: The car begins a left turn on the elevated highway, revealing a massive red holographic koi fish swimming through the air on the left. The blue jellyfish hologram fades into the distance as the vehicle navigates the curve. An orange-tinted glass building becomes prominent on the left side as the car continues its arc.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway through dense urban canyon with holographic advertisements

events.description: vehicle completes the left turn and resumes straight trajectory
red holographic koi fish swims out of frame to the right

agents.ego_description: driving straight through the neon-lit urban canyon after completing the turn

entered.detail: tall building with yellow and orange illuminated facade featuring geometric patterns
elevated train track structure running parallel to the highway
blue holographic humanoid figure displayed on the side of a building

segments.scene_description: After completing the left turn, the car drives straight through a dense urban canyon. The red koi fish hologram swims away to the right and disappears. A prominent yellow-orange skyscraper and an elevated railway bridge dominate the left side, while new holographic advertisements appear on the surrounding buildings. The vehicle continues along the reflective highway surface through the neon-lit cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement behind a red sports car as it navigates a curving elevated highway through a neon-drenched urban canyon. It begins with the vehicle driving straight toward a massive blue holographic jellyfish floating between towering glass skyscrapers and searchlights. As the car initiates a left turn, the jellyfish fades into the distance and is replaced by a giant red holographic koi fish swimming through the air beside an orange-tinted glass building. The scene then shifts as the vehicle completes its arc and drives straight again, watching the koi fish swim away to the right while a prominent yellow-orange skyscraper and an elevated railway bridge emerge on the left. Finally, the camera continues forward along the reflective wet road, passing under new holographic advertisements that illuminate the dense cityscape.
